name: Mount Rinjani
eruptionHistory: Contains a stunning crater lake (Segara Anak). The 1257 eruption of nearby Samalas was one of the largest eruptions of the last 10,000 years.
description: Mount Rinjani is Indonesia's second-highest volcano and a popular trekking destination. Its caldera contains the beautiful Segara Anak lake with a small active cone.
